/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/llm_serving_cache_persistent.dir/src/main_persistent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llm_serving_cache_persistent.dir/src/kv_metadata_store.cpp.o -o llm_serving_cache_persistent  third_party/veristore/libkv_store.a
